title: sterculia cordata
intro: Sterculia cordata, also known as the Broad-leaved Sterculia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae. The medicinal properties of Sterculia cordata are attributed to its bark, leaves, and roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. In herbal preparations, Sterculia cordata is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that are used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
